description:
You are a localization engineer who has been asked to add French ( fr ) support to an existing translation set that already contains a template (*.pot*) file and a Spanish (*.po*) file.

Current project layout  
/home/user/i18n/  
├── source/  
│   └── messages.pot  
└── es/  
    └── messages.po  

Goal  
1. Create a new directory /home/user/i18n/fr  
2. Copy the template file /home/user/i18n/source/messages.pot into that directory and rename it to messages.po  
3. Inside the newly-created /home/user/i18n/fr/messages.po change the value of the Project-Id-Version header from  
   Project-Id-Version: PACKAGE VERSION  
   to  
   Project-Id-Version: MyApp 2.0  
   (Keep the surrounding double-quotes, newline escape “\n”, and every other header line exactly as they are.)  

4. Produce a plain-text log file called /home/user/update_translation.log that lists the three actions you performed.  
   • The file must contain exactly three lines, no extra blank lines or spaces.  
   • The required format of each line is:  
     ACTION_NAME:ARGUMENT  
   • The exact lines that must appear, in this order, are:  
     CREATED_DIR:/home/user/i18n/fr  
     COPIED_TEMPLATE:/home/user/i18n/fr/messages.po  
     UPDATED_HEADER:MyApp 2.0  

Verification notes  
Automated tests will:
• Check that /home/user/i18n/fr exists and is a directory.  
• Confirm that /home/user/i18n/fr/messages.po exists, is readable, and is byte-for-byte identical to /home/user/i18n/source/messages.pot except for the required header change.  
• Inspect /home/user/update_translation.log for the three exactly matching lines in the specified order with no trailing or leading whitespace.  

Carry out the steps in the terminal. Do not show the commands you used—only the final state matters to the tests.
truth:
Initial files present when the agent starts:

1. Path: /home/user/i18n/source/messages.pot  
   Permissions: 644  
   Contents (11 lines, final newline included):
msgid ""
msgstr ""
"Project-Id-Version: PACKAGE VERSION\n"
"POT-Creation-Date: 2023-01-01 12:00+0000\n"
"PO-Revision-Date: YEAR-MO-DA HO:MI+ZONE\n"
"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
"Language-Team: \n"
"Language: \n"
"MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"
"Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"

2. Path: /home/user/i18n/es/messages.po  
   (Content is irrelevant to this task; it just exists.)

Expected final state:

A. Directory /home/user/i18n/fr exists (755).  

B. File /home/user/i18n/fr/messages.po exists (644) and its contents are identical to /home/user/i18n/source/messages.pot EXCEPT that the third logical header line now reads:
"Project-Id-Version: MyApp 2.0\n"

All other lines, order, and newlines remain exactly the same.

C. File /home/user/update_translation.log exists (644) and contains exactly these 3 lines (with a single trailing newline at the end of the third line and no extra blank lines or spaces):

CREATED_DIR:/home/user/i18n/fr
COPIED_TEMPLATE:/home/user/i18n/fr/messages.po
UPDATED_HEADER:MyApp 2.0

Automated tests will perform the following checks:

1. Directory presence and permissions.  
2. SHA256 of messages.po must match that of messages.pot once the single header line replacement is accounted for.  
3. The log file must contain precisely the three required lines in order, matched with a strict string comparison.
